title: Inventory grid UI prototype
operationalUse: Sample fixture only. Do not use this scenario as operational release evidence for a real project.
userGoal: Create an inventory that appears as item slots, not as a plain text list.
milestone: Inspectable inventory UI with clickable item slots

expectedDocuments.expected: The inventory is described as a grid of item slots with item feedback.
The technical design defines Canvas, inventory panel, grid layout, item cells, and click handling.
The scene blueprint includes /UI/InventoryPanel and slot children.
The input spec defines how inventory opens and how item slots are clicked.
The change set records generated or prefab-backed UI cells instead of a text list.

validationChecks.expected: Inventory content is represented as grid cells, not a single plain Text list.
Clicking an item slot triggers the documented selection behavior.
The inventory can open and an item slot can be selected in Play Mode.
The UI hierarchy and validation status are documented.

passCriteria: Inventory uses slots or prefab-backed cells.
The UI is clickable in Play Mode.
The scene blueprint and technical design describe the inventory hierarchy.
The implementation does not replace game-facing inventory with a plain text list.
